Video.summary: Steve will put Brittany’s sister Jami and boyfriend Luis to the lie detector test to find out if Luis coerced Jami into having sex. Then, did Cassandra sleep with her husband Greg’s brother Collin? Is Collin their child’s father? Find out today!
Video.title: Betrayed By My Family?

Video.summary: Tony confesses to his girlfriend that he is cheating on her with a transsexual. Mary confronts her transsexual roommate Shortee. Next, Limont confronts his one-night stand.
Video.title: Tales of the She-Males

Video.summary: Nesi thinks Omar is cheating on her with another man from text messages on his phone. Plus, Karissa’s life fell apart after she and her husband moved in with Josh! A few weeks later, their baby mysteriously died. What will the lie detectors say?
Video.title: Does My Boyfriend Have a Gay Secret?

Image.alt: Does My Boyfriend Have a Gay Secret?
Does My Boyfriend Have a Gay Secret?
Does My Boyfriend Have a Gay Secret?

Video.summary: David has hit and choked Whitney, which led her to being hospitalized. She’s here to prove that she never cheated on David. Then, Nathalie’s husband, Ruby, admitted to cheating on her during their marriage. Can Steve help these women leave their men?
Video.title: How Could You Beat Your Wife Like That?

Image.alt: How Could You Beat Your Wife Like That?
How Could You Beat Your Wife Like That?
How Could You Beat Your Wife Like That?

Video.summary: Did Marcus’s ex’s boyfriend Charles molest their son? Ex Jamaica is torn between kicking out Charles for the meanwhile and wondering if Marcus’s girlfriend Tonya is lying to gain custody of the boy. What will Charles’s lie detector test say?
Video.title: A Mother's Wrath

Video.summary: Keith has been accused of touching his 3-year-old son inappropriately by Crystal, the mother of his children, which he strongly denies. He says this is the result of her anger over an affair he had. But will the lie detector test prove him right?
Video.title: I Stand Accused

Video.summary: Amber may not be the best mother, but her abusive boyfriend Alex is making their relationship and her son's upbringing, even worse. Then, David is desperate to get his kids back from ex-wife Fawn, who alleges David was an abusive father.
Video.title: He Beat Me In My Sleep/He Pulled A Gun On Me

Image.alt: He Beat Me In My Sleep/He Pulled A Gun On Me
He Beat Me In My Sleep/He Pulled A Gun On Me
He Beat Me In My Sleep/He Pulled A Gun On Me

Video.summary: Very intimate photos of newlywed Chami with another man surface on a porn website; Keandra's boyfriend has accused her of cheating with co-workers, strangers and an elderly neighbor.
Video.title: I Saw My Wife on a Porn Site

Image.alt: I Saw My Wife on a Porn Site
I Saw My Wife on a Porn Site
I Saw My Wife on a Porn Site

Video.summary: Erica kicked her boyfriend Martez out of their house and out of her life. But she’s willing to give him a second chance if he proves that he didn’t molest her 4 year old son! Then, Christy’s ex Stephen refuses to admit that he fathered her son!
Video.title: Single Mothers Get Results

Video.summary: Priscilla's boyfriend admits to cheating but blames her and her pregnancy for his behavior; Santana says he is willing to change, but his actions may be too little, too late; Scoota wants the benefits of a relationship without the attachment.
Video.title: I Cheated Because You're Pregnant

Video.summary: Barin's new girlfriend has a secret; Ericka disapproves of her sister's girlfriend; another man may ruin Tyler's wedding.
Video.title: My Big Gay Wedding

Video.summary: Angelo is here to tell his girlfriend that he's a woman. Next, Mikey brought his girlfriend here to tell her that he's been cheating on her. But she has surprise of her own. Later Jennifer feels she must tell her lover the truth about her sexuality
Video.title: I'm Lying to my Lover

Video.summary: Kitten wants to tell her mother that she is a prostitute because her mother was neglectful and drove her to it. These two women face off over the lies. Next ... Even though Skat's ex-girlfriend is married, he believes he can win her back!
Video.title: Heartbreaking Secrets

Video.summary: Sarah confronts her boyfriend and the woman with whom he is rumored to have had a rendezvous; Thomas professes an emotional connection to his friend's girlfriend; Tootie breaks bad news to her boyfriend and his meddling sister.
Video.title: A Hot Minute

Video.summary: Jamie has been stripping and cheating on her boyfriend with a woman! Then, Steve believes his wife’s been cheating with another man. Next LaToya's here to cause a family feud. She's been cheating with her girlfriend's sister!
Video.title: Hidden Affairs!

Video.summary: Shantell decided that she needs to fix her relationship with Kenneth so she's going to tell her mistress that it's over. Then Dean says that he wants to take their relationship to the next level, but Kendra's here to let Dean in on a little secret.
Video.title: Lesbian and Gay Affairs Confessed

Video.summary: Pamela is here today to tell her best friend, Terri, that she is sleeping with her son, Brandon. Next Deaire has been sleeping with Brenda’s 62-year-old mother! Then Brandi will tell her fiancé that she's been having an affair with twin brothers!
Video.title: Wild Affairs!

Video.summary: Glenda has been hiding two secrets from her boyfriend: She's secretly been seeing her ex and she wants to be a stripper! Then Veronica broke up with Roland when she caught him cheating. Now she's dating one of his friends and Roland wants her back.
Video.title: Secrets Come Out

Video.summary: Deja confronts her child's father to find out why she found her friend's number on his call log; Christian wanted to do the right thing after fathering a baby, then hooked up with another woman; Davonta says his ex is crazy, and he wants to be free.
Video.title: Dangerously in Love

Video.summary: Mookie has a confession that could be a deal breaker; Kelvin assures his girlfriend that an encounter he had at a movie theater meant nothing; two women's feelings are mutual, but one of them has a boyfriend.
Video.title: Awkward Hook-Ups

Video.summary: 38 year old Salina is married to 25 year old Robert. Robert always accuses Salina of lying and cheating, but she thinks he’s covering his own tracks! Later, is Ericka right to use social media sites to prove Robert’s infidelity?
Video.title: I'm 38…Is My 25-Year-Old Husband Sleeping With My Daughter?

Image.alt: I'm 38…Is My 25-Year-Old Husband Sleeping With My Daughter?
I'm 38…Is My 25-Year-Old Husband Sleeping With My Daughter?
I'm 38…Is My 25-Year-Old Husband Sleeping With My Daughter?

Video.summary: Is Michael the father of Mikaela and Catequa? London, Ieesha and Reggie are here today to find out if they are one of Mohammed’s 40 children! Mohammed denies it, but can’t run this time! Then, did Nicole cheat on Ted?
Video.title: You Have 18 Kids…We Will Prove You Are Our Dad!

Image.alt: You Have 18 Kids…We Will Prove You Are Our Dad!
You Have 18 Kids…We Will Prove You Are Our Dad!
You Have 18 Kids…We Will Prove You Are Our Dad!

Video.summary: Alicia dated John for 2 years before finding out he was a male exotic dancer named Temptation. Then April, who was born female, became Logan while she was married to Tom. During the show, Tom said that he did not want to continue being with Logan.
Video.title: Trisha Updates!

Video.summary: Robert thinks Kimberly might have been pregnant before she moved in with him. Is he really her child’s father? Later, Debra spent her entire life believing that Kenny was her father. But a relative revealed that Kenny confessed paternity doubts!
Video.title: 33 Years of Lies…Are You My Father Or Not?

Image.alt: 33 Years of Lies…Are You My Father Or Not?
33 Years of Lies…Are You My Father Or Not?
33 Years of Lies…Are You My Father Or Not?

Video.summary: Ron is investigating who has been stealing money from his bedroom. His prime suspects are his daughters, his wife Emily and her son Jeremy. And later Lori is also missing items in her home, including a handgun and she suspects her daughter Courtney.
Video.title: Will The Lie Detector Test Tear Our Family Apart?

Image.alt: Will The Lie Detector Test Tear Our Family Apart?
Will The Lie Detector Test Tear Our Family Apart?
Will The Lie Detector Test Tear Our Family Apart?

Video.summary: One week after Ralph was murdered, his parents received a call from a woman named Candy claiming that Ralph was the father of her 20-month old daughter. Then, Kiel is accusing Terri of cheating with several men including his own family members.
Video.title: Did My Fiancee Cheat and Have Another Man's Baby?

Image.alt: Did My Fiancee Cheat and Have Another Man's Baby?
Did My Fiancee Cheat and Have Another Man's Baby?
Did My Fiancee Cheat and Have Another Man's Baby?

Video.summary: Deon says Frankie has been accusing her of cheating and suspects he’s trying to cover his tracks! Then, Tessie suspects that her baby-daddy Donnell has been cheating, so she started secretly recording his phone conversations!
Video.title: I Brought The Divorce Papers…Prove You’re Not Cheating!

Image.alt: I Brought The Divorce Papers…Prove You’re Not Cheating!
I Brought The Divorce Papers…Prove You’re Not Cheating!
I Brought The Divorce Papers…Prove You’re Not Cheating!

Video.summary: Danielle discovered her husband Joshua was a member of dating websites. Joshua claims he didn’t set up the online profiles and is not cheating. Then, Lorita found her boyfriend Chris lying in bed wearing only boxers and her sister on the couch.
Video.title: Is My Sister Having An Affair With The Man I Love?

Image.alt: Is My Sister Having An Affair With The Man I Love?
Is My Sister Having An Affair With The Man I Love?
Is My Sister Having An Affair With The Man I Love?

Video.summary: Chad’s mother and sister, both named Tammy, claim his ex-girlfriend April cheated. They think she was with other men during the entire relationship and her 3 children may not be his. Later, Kira says her boyfriend Terry is a cheater!
Video.title: Secrets Revealed…I'm The Woman Your Man Is Cheating With!

Image.alt: Secrets Revealed…I'm The Woman Your Man Is Cheating With!
Secrets Revealed…I'm The Woman Your Man Is Cheating With!
Secrets Revealed…I'm The Woman Your Man Is Cheating With!

Video.summary: Roshana and Shanea grew up believing that Dwayne was their father. But when Dwayne's new wife came into the picture, she started claiming that Roshana and Shanaa are not his children. Now Dwayne also thinks he is not their father.
Video.title: You Lied For 30 Years and I'll Prove It!

Image.alt: You Lied For 30 Years and I'll Prove It!
You Lied For 30 Years and I'll Prove It!
You Lied For 30 Years and I'll Prove It!

Video.summary: Shara is devastated that her teen daughter Jenna is wild and out of control. Then, Tee says her 15-year old daughter Aalana is heading down a path of self-destruction. Aalana even abuses her sister CiCi because she thinks her mother favors CiCi more.
Video.title: Help! My 14 Year Old Daughter Is Dealing Drugs And Having Sex!

Image.alt: Help! My 14 Year Old Daughter Is Dealing Drugs And Having Sex!
Help! My 14 Year Old Daughter Is Dealing Drugs And Having Sex!
Help! My 14 Year Old Daughter Is Dealing Drugs And Having Sex!

Video.summary: Linda aka Ms. Jackson is 55 years old and still dresses sexy. Her daughter-in-law and grand-daughter Marsell and Antyenelte believe she is in dire need of a make-over and needs to tone down the clothing. But Linda isn't trying to hear that.
Video.title: Put Some Clothes On! You're Too Old To Dress Sexy

Image.alt: Put Some Clothes On! You're Too Old To Dress Sexy
Put Some Clothes On! You're Too Old To Dress Sexy
Put Some Clothes On! You're Too Old To Dress Sexy

Video.summary: Tempestt believes Marquis has stolen money from her and cheated with other women! Then, 42-year-old Mary was just 13 when she met Mark, but now she’s unsure if her husband is cheating on her! What do the lie detector tests say?
Video.title: Is The Man I Love Cheating and Stealing From Me?

Image.alt: Is The Man I Love Cheating and Stealing From Me?
Is The Man I Love Cheating and Stealing From Me?
Is The Man I Love Cheating and Stealing From Me?
